untranslatable_reason: Signal requires visual pattern recognition (formation identification, partial rise detection, lower trend line positioning) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The rule relies on manual chart pattern analysis rather than quantitative conditions. The 'measure rule' for target (lowest price in formation) also requires pattern-specific reference points not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate entry using price action below previous high and below 20-day MA as proxy for downward breakout confirmation and pullback toward trend line. Exit uses reversal above 20-day MA as reasonable reversal condition. However, core signal logic (formation detection, lower trend line identification, partial rise confirmation) remains untranslatable without access to pattern recognition or custom formation indicators.
